name: mathjslab-app
description: MathJSLab - An interpreter with language syntax like MATLAB®/Octave, ISBN 978-65-00-82338-7. A demo application from the mathjslab npm package, ISBN 978-65-00-84828-1.
author: MathJSLab <mathjslab@gmail.com>

scripts.clean:eleventy: shx rm -rf dist/example/en dist/example/es dist/example/pt sitemap.xml mathjslab-en.bib mathjslab-pt.bib mathjslab-es.bib src/styles/constants.json
scripts.clean:build: shx rm -rf dist report src/first-example.json src/build-configuration.json
scripts.clean:eleventy:build:script:webapp: npm run clean:eleventy && npm run clean:build && npm run clean:script && npm run clean:webapp
scripts.clean:copy: npm run npx:tsx -- script/helper/copy-repo-files.ts clean && npx shx rm -rf script/helper/copy-repo-files.ts && npx shx rm -rf copy.repo.config.json
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run clean:package-lock && npm run clean:copy
scripts.clone:repository: shx rm -rf repo && shx mkdir -p repo && git clone https://github.com/MathJSLab/.github.git repo/.github
scripts.precopy:repository: shx cp repo/.github/script/helper/copy-repo-files.ts script/helper/copy-repo-files.ts && shx cp repo/.github/resource/mathjslab-app/copy.repo.config.json copy.repo.config.json
scripts.clone:copy:clean:repository: npm run clone:repository && npm run copy:repository && npm run clean:repository
scripts.install:webapp: npm run install:capacitor && npm run install:android
scripts.remove:webapp: npm run remove:android && npm run remove:capacitor
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run clone:copy:clean:repository && npm run clean && npm run build:script
scripts.update: npx npm-check-updates -u -x typescript && npm run install:all
scripts.git:all: npm run git:add && npm run git:commit && npm run git:push
scripts.format:lint: npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.prebuild:dev: npm run build:eleventy &&  npm run build:assets
scripts.build:add:android: npm run build && npm run add:android
scripts.build:sync:android: npm run build && npm run sync:android
scripts.build:add:open:android: npm run build:add:android && npm run open:android
scripts.build:sync:open:android: npm run build:sync:android && npm run open:android
scripts.build:all: npm run clean && npm run update && npm run build:add:android
scripts.do:all: npm run crono:start && npm run clean:all && npm run update && npm run format:lint && npm run build && npm run git:all && echo script "do:all" finished. && npm run crono:stop
